title: Amaze Flags: Europe
description: e. Enjoy this short quiz to see how much you know about European countries and nations in general. Examine the flags and select the best country name to correspond with each one. This puzzle-solving game, suitable for all ages, will help you improve your skills as soon as possible. You can test your mettle by playing games in both timing and timeless modes, solving all the riddles to win. Enjoy yourself and play more games exclusively at jhurr
